subject: Request refund for order ORD-001
message: Hi, I would like to request a refund for my laptop order ORD-001. I received it but it is not what I expected. Can you process a refund?

subject: Where is my order?
message: I ordered a mouse order ORD-002 five days ago and have not received tracking information. When will it arrive?

subject: Can I still return my keyboard?
message: I bought a keyboard ORD-003 about 45 days ago. Is it too late to return it? It stopped working.
